name: Renewal Prep Brief - Backstory Starter
description: Automatically generates renewal preparation briefs at 60, 30, and 15 days before each account's renewal date. The workflow queries the CRM for upcoming renewals, enriches each account with Backstory engagement trends, support history, expansion signals, and key contact activity. An AI agent produces a structured brief covering account health, risk factors, expansion opportunities, and a recommended renewal strategy. Briefs are delivered to the assigned CSM and account executive via Messaging.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Fetch accounts with renewal milestones at 60, 30, or 15 days and include owner + contract metadata. Replace the placeholder API endpoints and tokens with real systems before enabling this workflow.

nodes.name: Get Backstory Auth Token
nodes.notes: Optional if you are using MCP only, but kept here to match the existing repo’s n8n patterns.

nodes.name: Fetch Source Records
nodes.notes: Fetch accounts with renewal milestones at 60, 30, or 15 days and include owner + contract metadata.

nodes.name: Normalize Source Records
nodes.notes: Converts raw upcoming renewals responses into one item per record for downstream AI analysis.

nodes.name: Analyze Renewal Prep Brief

parameters.text:
=You are generating the Renewal Prep Brief workflow output.

PURPOSE:
Automatically generates renewal preparation briefs at 60, 30, and 15 days before each account's renewal date. The workflow queries the CRM for upcoming renewals, enriches each account with Backstory engagement trends, support history, expansion signals, and key contact activity. An AI agent produces a structured brief covering account health, risk factors, expansion opportunities, and a recommended renewal strategy. Briefs are delivered to the assigned CSM and account executive via Messaging.

SOURCE PAYLOAD:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.record, null, 2) }}

TASKS:
1. Use Backstory MCP to enrich the record with the most relevant account, opportunity, engagement, or stakeholder context.
2. Decide what matters most for the renewal prep brief use case.
3. Produce a concise markdown summary with: headline, key findings, risks, recommended actions, and routing notes if applicable.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS:
- Keep it compact enough for Slack.
- Prefer bullets.
- Mention concrete dates, owners, amounts, or stages when the data provides them.
- If the source record is incomplete, explicitly say what is missing.

REFERENCE STYLE:
🔄 **Renewal Prep Brief** — Globex Industries | ⏰ 30 Days to Renewal

📊 **ACCOUNT SNAPSHOT:**
- ARR: ===$340,000=== | Renewal Date: Apr 8, 2026
- Health Score: 6/10 (down from 8 at last QBR)
- CSM: @emily.ross | AE: @sarah.chen

🟢 **STRENGTHS:**
- Product adoption: 87% feature utilization (above 75% benchmark)
- Champion Lisa Wong remains actively engaged — 3 meetings in last 2 weeks

options.systemMessage: You are a Backstory workflow analyst generating Renewal Prep Brief outputs. Keep the response actionable, concrete, and Slack-friendly.

nodes.notes: Wire your preferred LLM credentials to the chat model node after import.

nodes.name: Backstory MCP
nodes.notes: This mirrors the existing workflow infrastructure in the repo. Add MCP auth headers after import.

nodes.name: Aggregate Results
nodes.notes: Collapses all analyzed records into a single outbound summary. Replace this with per-owner routing if you want one message per rep/CSM/executive.

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: Swap this node for Teams or SMTP if Slack is not your delivery target.
